d:
Passive. Valka applies a stack of panic to an enemy with her normal attacks, lasting [[10]]s. After 4 stacks, the enemy is struck with a sudden fear of battle, falling into a panic state for [[10]]s and losing [[10]] Haste.
Valka can only cast Blooming Terror on adjacent enemies who are in a panic state. This skill consumes [[100]] Energy and removes the enemy's panic status, stunning them while executing two powerful slashes. Each slash deals true damage equal to [[6%]] of the target's max HP and recovers [[350%]]<ATK> of Valka's HP. Afterward, Valka draws her sword to land another slash, dealing true damage equal to [[12%]] of the target's max HP and knocking them down. Each slash damage is capped at [[400%]]<ATK>. While casting, Valka is [[unaffected]] and can only use this skill on the same enemy once every [[6]]s.

When used actively, increases the damage of each of the first two slashes to [[7.5%]] of the enemy's max HP, and the damage of the final slash to [[13.5%]] of their max HP. Each slash damage is capped at [[500%]]<ATK>.

When used actively, increases the damage of each of the first two slashes to [[9%]] of the enemy's max HP, and the damage of the final slash to [[15%]] of their max HP. Each slash damage is capped at [[600%]]<ATK>.

When used actively, increases the damage of each of the first two slashes to [[10.5%]] of the enemy's max HP, and the damage of the final slash to [[16.5%]] of their max HP. Each slash damage is capped at [[700%]]<ATK>.

When used actively, increases the damage of each of the first two slashes to [[12%]] of the enemy's max HP, and the damage of the final slash to [[18%]] of their max HP. Each slash damage is capped at [[800%]]<ATK>.

Valka refines her combat skills and masters new sword techniques as she levels up. Each sword technique is considered a normal attack with its own cooldown.
Masters "Soul Slicer": When there is more than one adjacent enemy, Valka consumes [[300]] Energy to deliver [[2]] slashes, each dealing [[140%]]<ATK> damage.

Masters "Wrecking Blade": When there is only one adjacent enemy, Valka consumes [[300]] Energy to perform a slash, dealing [[140%]]<ATK> damage. She then leaps into the air to deliver a more powerful slash, dealing [[190%]]<ATK> damage and knocking the enemy down for [[1]]s.

Masters "Restless Chase": When there are no adjacent enemies, Valka consumes [[150]] Energy to roll toward the nearest enemy within [[3]] tiles, dodging high-arcing projectiles from normal attacks and gaining a shield that blocks [[220%]]<ATK> damage. She then executes a powerful slash, dealing [[150%]]<ATK> damage.

Increases the damage of each Soul Slicer slash to [[180%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage of the first Wrecking Blade slash to [[170%]]<ATK> and the second slash to [[230%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage of Restless Chase to [[180%]]<ATK>.

When a battle starts, Valka gains a shield that blocks [[24%]]<HP> damage if an ally is within [[1]] tile of her. The shield value increases by the same amount for each additional ally in this range, up to a maximum of [[72%]]<HP>. Valka also increases the ATK SPD of these allies by [[50]] until the battle ends.
Increases shield value to [[26%]]<HP> for each ally within range, and the maximum shield value to [[78%]]<HP>.
Increases shield value to [[28%]]<HP> for each ally within range, and the maximum shield value to [[84%]]<HP>.
Increases shield value to [[30%]]<HP> for each ally within range, and the maximum shield value to [[90%]]<HP>.
Increases ATK SPD by [[18]] during battle.
Increases ATK SPD by [[24]] during battle.
Increases ATK SPD by [[30]] during battle.

Upon taking Ultimate skill damage from an enemy within her attack range, Valka instantly blocks the attack and becomes immune to the damage. She then casts Blooming Terror on the attacker without consuming Energy or removing the enemy's panic status. Instead, she recovers [[250]] Energy. While casting, Valka is [[unaffected]] and can only use this skill on the same enemy once every [[10]]s.
Increases Energy recovery from Blooming Terror to [[300]] after blocking.
Within [[10]]s of casting this skill, increases own ATK SPD by [[80]] and Life Drain by [[60]].
Increases Energy recovery from Blooming Terror to [[350]] after blocking.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, reduces damage taken by [[10%]] for [[20]]s when a battle starts. [[20]]s later, increases damage dealt by [[10%]] for [[20]]s.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 24 Crit Resist, 10 DEF Penetration.

d: While shield granted by Spectral Bulwark is active, Valka recovers [[50]] extra Energy from launching normal attacks.

Valka's Ultimate damage increases by [[0.6%]] with each point of her ATK SPD and Haste. Whenever she casts her Ultimate, she also gains a shield as if Spectral Bulwark had triggered, with a shield value of [[30%]]<HP>.
